title: Snowbound
description: A Minecraft mod that adds new snow-themed biomes, blocks, weapons, armor and items.
body:
![Snowbound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/102fd14f264635c84b777989e47f32a3949d732c.png) # **Requires GeckoLib** (Recommended version, 4.6.6) **Snowbound** introduces a frosty new dimension to Minecraft, enhancing the cold biomes with powerful tools and mysterious new landscapes. Players can wield the **Frozen Bow**, a weapon that shoots frozen arrows capable of immobilizing enemies. To protect against the dangers of the icy wilderness. The **Frozen Armor** provides enhanced defense and grants extra speed when exploring cold biomes. Crafting this armor requires the **Blue Ice Cauldron**, a special crafting station designed for harnessing the chill of the environment. Explore the majestic **Boreal Forest**, a new biome filled with towering **Pine Wood Trees**, offering a fresh building material and a cold, atmospheric environment perfect for adventurers seeking new challenges. Embrace the cold and uncover the secrets of the frozen world in **Snowbound**.



## Crafting Recipes **Frozen Arrow**\ \ Arrrow + Snowball + Packed Ice

**Frozen Bow**\ \ Bow + Frozen Nether Star + Netherite Ingot

**Frozen Nether Star**\ \ 8 Blue Ice + Nether Star

**Blue Ice Cauldron**\ \ Right-click on an empty **Cauldron** with **Blue Ice**

**Glacial Armor**\ \ Right-click on a **Blue Ice Cauldron** with **a piece of Diamond Armor**

Recommended to use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or a similar mod for crafting recipes not listed above.
